title: Mazda SKE126-01 Key Fob
short description: SKE126-01 Key Fob used for multiple Mazda models between 2006-2014. Manufactured by Mitsubishi Electric Company.
description:
Mazda SKE126-01 Key Fob for Mazda models without proximity keyless system.

**Used in:**

Mazda 2 (2011 - 2014)

Mazda 3 (2009 - 2013)

Mazda 5 (2005 - 2015) without motorised side doors

Mazda 6 (2007 - 2012)

Mazda CX7 (2007 - 2015)

Mazda MX5 (2006 - 2012)
